title: Department of Homeland Security
description: Celebrate America's 250th anniversary with the Department of Homeland Security. Explore events, stories, and milestones leading up to July 4, 2026.
text:
Countdown to America's 250th Anniversary!
On July 4, 2026, America will celebrate the most important milestone in our countryâs history - 250 years of American Independence. Celebrate the triumph of the American Spirit with DHS at one of our upcoming events! Visit WH.gov/america250 for more information.
